## ❌ NEVER PROPOSE (hard rejections)

These proposal types are permanently rejected. Proposing them again wastes a swarm slot.

- API gateway / microservices — monolith works (Session 23)
- Redis — not needed until 2+ Railway instances (Session 23)
- ORM (SQLAlchemy, Prisma) — Supabase SDK only (Session 23)
- Privacy by default (hidden scores) — CEO reviewed and chose public by default (Session 23)
- OpenAI as primary LLM — Gemini is primary (Session 23)
- FastAPI WebSocket / ANUS real-time layer — explicitly deferred until 2026-07-01 or 500 active users (Session 23)
- Route shadowing /me vs /{volunteer_id} — FastAPI resolves correctly but can be problematic (Session 25, 42)
- Delete non-gitignored files — only gitignored artifacts should be touched (Session 25)
- Propose microservices without data — bring requests/sec, latency data (Session 23)

## ✅ HIGH-VALUE PATTERNS (do more of these)

These types of proposals consistently get implemented or praised.

- Discovery endpoint for orgs — critical for org value prop (Session 25)
- Schema snapshot in every task prompt — highest leverage improvement (Session 25)
